headline: Why Leidos Holdings (LDOS) Could Be Entering A New Growth Phase
summary: Leidos Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:LDOS) is among the 11 Undervalued Quantum Computing Stocks to Invest In. On April 8, Leidos Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:LDOS) saw Jefferies lower its price target to $185 from $215 while maintaining a Buy rating, reflecting updated estimates following the company’s acquisition of ENTRUST for $2.4 billion. The analyst expects Leidos to reiterate its […]

headline: Spotting Winners: Leidos (NYSE:LDOS) And Defense Contractors Stocks In Q4
summary: The end of the earnings season is always a good time to take a step back and see who shined (and who not so much). Let’s take a look at how defense contractors stocks fared in Q4, starting with Leidos (NYSE:LDOS).
